auth.loginSubtitle: Pick up where you left off.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to get started.
auth.name: Display name
auth.registerSubtitleShort: Track your favorite anime and share your reviews.
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: Check your inbox — if the account exists, a link is on its way.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a password with at least 8 characters.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in.
auth.verifySuccess: Email verified. You can now sign in.

review.title: Community reviews
review.bodyPlaceholder: What did you think of this anime? (optional)
review.empty: No reviews yet. Be the first.

watchlist.loginRationale: Track progress, rate, and get new episode alerts.

pricing.title: Pay if you want.
pricing.subtitle: Miru will always be free for the essentials. The Sympathisant plan exists for those who want to support the project — not to unlock features.
pricing.freeDescription: Everything essential. No ads, no limits.
pricing.proDescription: Support development without changing your experience.
pricing.noLockBody: The Sympathisant plan grants nothing the free version doesn't — it's a contribution, not a paywall. If in doubt, stick with free, all good.
pricing.alreadyActive: You've been a Sympathisant since {date} — thank you.
pricing.manageInSettings: You can manage your subscription from settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.billingActiveDescription: Active since {date}. You can manage payment and cancel anytime.
settings.billingInactiveDescription: Support the project for €4/month. Nothing unlocks — it's purely a contribution.
settings.languageDescription: Pick the language shown across Miru. Changes apply immediately.
